Patch Set 1:

Looks like this has already caught at least one problem...
Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 2:

Code-wise looks good to me.

Patch Set 2:

I change the assert in ptlrpc_set_wait to cwarn + dump_stack(), since we can not avoid sending rpc inside migration yet.  During migration, it needs to update the parent EA on the ost object, it is not easy to do it outside the transaction, see mdd_migrate_update_name ---> lod_xattr_set() ->lod_object_replace_parent_fid().

parents.subject: LU-8704 lod: Not sending RPC for lookup ost idx

commit.subject: LU-8704 osd: add journal info check
commit.message:
LU-8704 osd: add journal info check

check current->journal_info in osd_trans_declare_op()
and ptlrpc_set_wait(), to make sure the current
thread is not holding any journal, otherwise it
may cause deadlock.

Signed-off-by: Di Wang <di.wang@intel.com>
Change-Id: I950a98c15d6359d0601dee40726acc62f4c1e38a
